CREATE TABLE polygons_table (id UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT wkt(polygonsSymDifferenceCartesian((SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1), (SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 2))) AS result;
CREATE TABLE additional_polygons (id UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT wkt(polygonsSymDifferenceCartesian((SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1), (SELECT polygon FROM additional_polygons WHERE id = 3))) AS result;

SELECT wkt(polygonsSymDifferenceCartesian((SELECT polygon FROM (SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table UNION ALL SELECT polygon FROM additional_polygons) AS subquery WHERE id = 1), (SELECT polygon FROM additional_polygons WHERE id = 3))) AS result;
CREATE TABLE complex_polygons (id UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT wkt(polygonsSymDifferenceCartesian((SELECT polygon FROM complex_polygons WHERE id = 4), (SELECT polygon FROM complex_polygons WHERE id = 5))) AS result;
SELECT wkt(polygonsSymDifferenceCartesian((SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table LIMIT 1), ARRAY JOIN [(SELECT polygon FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 2)])) AS result;
